z.GLib main loop integration using libdbus-glib.)
DBusGMainLoop
threads_init
gthreads_initFc
Initialize threads in dbus-glib, if this has not already been done.
    This must be called before creating a second thread in a program that
    uses this module.
    TN)
_dbus_gthreads_initializedr
8/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/dbus/mainloop/glib.pyr
__doc__
__all__Z
_dbus_glib_bindingsr
<module>
